indicators.name: no bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or any resting surface makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture or personal items
indicators.rationale: The lack of furniture or personal items indicates a lack of personalization and comfort, which are important for sleep.

indicators.name: no windows or curtains
indicators.rationale: No windows or curtains make it impossible to control light and noise, which are critical for sleep.

indicators.name: no lighting control
indicators.rationale: The bright artificial lighting is incompatible with sleep and cannot be dimmed.

reasoning_summary: This space is completely unsuitable for sleep (primary). There is no resting surface, no personal items, no windows or curtains, and no lighting control, making it a poor environment for sleep.
